sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 58:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 58:1
items.html: The root of the four worlds ABYA is the world of Nekudim. However, prior to that, there is no root to the worlds there since there was still no association of the quality of mercy with judgement there. (Beginning of Inner Observation)
